testcase.name: codigo_respeta_arquitectura_hexagonal
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'Layered architecture considering all dependencies, consisting of layer 'Domain' ('..domain..') layer 'Application' ('..application..') layer 'Adapters' ('..adaptors..') where layer 'Domain' may only be accessed by layers ['Application', 'Adapters'] where layer 'Application' may only be accessed by layers ['Adapters'] where layer 'Adapters' may not be accessed by any layer' was violated (25 times): Constructor <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.domain.model.ReservasCommandEndpointV2.<init>(es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.application.usecase.crearreservas.CrearReservaCommandHandler, (ReservasCommandEndpointV2.java:0) Constructor testcase.name: toda_implementacion_acaba_en_impl
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'classes that are interfaces and are not enums and implementa al menos una interfaz should have simple name ending with 'Impl'' was violated (6 times): Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaParkingRepository> does not have simple name ending with 'Impl' in (JpaReservaParkingRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaParkingViewRepository> does not have simple name ending with 'Impl' in (JpaReservaParkingViewRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaTipoEstacionamientoRepository> does not have simple name ending with 'Impl' in (JpaTipoEstacionamientoRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaVueloRepository> does not have simple name ending with 'Impl' in (JpaReservaVueloRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaReservaVueloViewRepository> does not have simple name ending with 'Impl' in (JpaReservaVueloViewRepository.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.persistence.jpa.repository.JpaVueloRepository> does not have simple name ending with 'Impl' in (JpaVueloRepository.java:0) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Assertions.assertNoViolation(ArchRule.java:94) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Assertions.check(ArchRule.java:86) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Factory$SimpleArchRule.check(ArchRule.java:165) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ObjectsShouldInternal.check(ObjectsShouldInternal.java:81) at com.tngtech.archunit.junit.internal.ArchUnitTestDescriptor$ArchUnitRuleDescriptor.execute(ArchUnitTestDescriptor.java:168) at com.tngtech.archunit.junit.internal.ArchUnitTestDescriptor$ArchUnitRuleDescriptor.execute(ArchUnitTestDescriptor.java:151) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511)

testcase.name: RestController_solo_capa_adptadores
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'classes that are annotated with @RestController should reside in any package ['..adapters..'], because Los RestController solo pueden estar en la capa de adaptadores.' was violated (10 times): Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.api.rest.ParkingCommandEndpoint> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (ParkingCommandEndpoint.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.adaptors.api.rest.ParkingQueryEndpoint> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (ParkingQueryEndpoint.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.parking.domain.model.ReservasCommandEndpointV2> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (ReservasCommandEndpointV2.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.api.rest.v1.PruebasEndpoint> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (PruebasEndpoint.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.api.rest.v1.VuelosEndpointV1> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (VuelosEndpointV1.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.api.rest.v1.VuelosQueryEndpointV1> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (VuelosQueryEndpointV1.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.api.rest.v2.ReservasEndpointV2> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (ReservasEndpointV2.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.api.rest.v2.ReservasQueryEndpointV2> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (ReservasQueryEndpointV2.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.api.rest.v2.VuelosEndpointV2> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (VuelosEndpointV2.java:0) Class <es.um.atica.umufly.vuelos.adaptors.api.rest.v2.VuelosQueryEndpointV2> does not reside in any package ['..adapters..'] in (VuelosQueryEndpointV2.java:0) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Assertions.assertNoViolation(ArchRule.java:94) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Assertions.check(ArchRule.java:86) at com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule$Factory$SimpleArchRule.check(ArchRule.java:165) at com.tngtech.archunit.junit.internal.ArchUnitTestDescriptor$ArchUnitRuleDescriptor.execute(ArchUnitTestDescriptor.java:168) at com.tngtech.archunit.junit.internal.ArchUnitTestDescriptor$ArchUnitRuleDescriptor.execute(ArchUnitTestDescriptor.java:151) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at
